query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as categoryCount, COUNT(pq.id) as questionCount FROM positions p LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId WHERE p.name = 'SERVIS' GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as categoryCount, COUNT(pq.id) as questionCount FROM positions p LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId WHERE p.name = 'SERVIS' GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
